items.caption: A pair of handcuffs designed to resemble a heart and two smaller hearts. the handcuffs are silver in color and have a shiny, metallic finish. the handcuffs are connected by a chain, and the keyhole is visible on the right side. the background is a plain white, emphasizing the handcuffs as the sole subject. the handcuffs are positioned in the center of the image, with the heart-shaped handcuffs on the left and the smaller hearts on the right. a 3d illustration, giving it a realistic appearance.
